mods.name: Performance Intake
mods.description: An upgraded intake for the EA888 2.0T engine improves turbo induction sound and provides slightly better airflow under load.
mods.installNotes: Remove stock airbox. Install new intake tube and cotton gauze or foam filter. 15 minutes. No tune required for most intakes.

mods.name: Catback Exhaust
mods.description: The stock GTI exhaust is very subdued. An aftermarket catback adds character and a sportier tone to the EA888 turbo-four.
mods.installNotes: Bolt-on from the downpipe flange back. Dual exit options available. Valved systems connect to factory drive mode switch. No cutting needed. 1 hour on jack stands.

mods.name: Lowering Springs
mods.description: Lower the Mk7 GTI by 20–25mm for improved handling and a more aggressive stance with minimal impact on ride quality.
mods.partNumbers: VWR Sport Springs, Eibach Pro-Kit E10-85-041-02-22
mods.installNotes: Spring compressor required. DCC (adaptive damper) equipped cars need DCC-compatible springs. Alignment required. 2 hour job.

mods.name: Stage 1 ECU Tune
mods.description: The EA888 Gen 3 responds incredibly well to tuning. Stage 1 adds 60–70hp and 80+ lb-ft of torque with zero hardware changes.
mods.partNumbers: APR Stage 1 ECU+TCU, Cobb AccessPort AP3-VLK-002
mods.installNotes: Flash via OBD-II at a dealer or via Cobb AccessPort. DSG tune is highly recommended — eliminates torque limiting and improves shift speed. Requires 93 octane. Transforms the car.

mods.name: Performance Downpipe
mods.description: A high-flow downpipe is required for Stage 2 tuning. Significantly improves turbo spool and adds 15–25hp over Stage 1 when retuned.
mods.partNumbers: CTS Turbo MK7 Downpipe, USP Motorsports High-Flow Catted DP
mods.installNotes: Access from below. Pre-soak turbo outlet bolts. O2 sensor spacer or tune needed for catless. Must retune to Stage 2 after install. 2 hours on a lift.

mods.name: Upgraded Intercooler
mods.description: Replace the factory plastic end-tank intercooler with an upgraded aluminum unit for consistent power and drastically lower intake temps.
mods.partNumbers: Wagner Tuning 200001048, CTS Turbo Direct Fit FMIC
mods.installNotes: Remove front bumper. Unbolt factory intercooler (plastic end tanks are fragile). New unit drops into factory location. Transfer charge pipe connections. 2–3 hours.

mods.name: IS38 Turbo Upgrade
mods.description: Swap the stock IS20 turbo for the IS38 from the Golf R. A bolt-on upgrade that pushes the Mk7 GTI to 350+ hp with supporting mods.
mods.partNumbers: VW IS38 06K-145-874-M (Golf R turbo), EQT IS38 tune
mods.installNotes: Direct bolt-on replacement for the IS20. Requires intercooler upgrade, intake, downpipe, and IS38-specific tune. DSG clutch packs should be upgraded at this power level. 6+ hours.

mods.name: Coilover Suspension
mods.description: Adjustable coilovers provide precise ride height and damping control. The MQB platform responds extremely well to suspension upgrades.
mods.installNotes: Full strut replacement. DCC-equipped cars need DCC module delete or bypass. Set ride height 20mm below stock. The Mk7 GTI handles brilliantly with proper coilovers. Full alignment required.
